name: Eggnog Cheesecake- Tkmhol
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, sugar, and butter. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake in a 325°F oven for 10 minutes. Let cool on a rack.
3. For the filling: Beat together the cream cheese, sugar, cream, flour, eggs, rum, and nutmeg until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the crust and bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce the temperature to 250°F and continue baking for an additional 45 minutes or until the center is barely firm to the touch.
6. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and let it cool before removing the sides.
7. Garnish with chocolate cutouts and candies.
